cta_section.title: Ready to create an unforgettable event?

story.title: Our Story
story.text: KPL SERVICES was born from a deep passion for decorative art and the desire to create unforgettable moments. What started as a simple desire to please through surprises has transformed into a true event company. With determination, creativity and a lot of love for detail, KPL SERVICES has gradually established itself as a reference in creating unique atmospheres and tailor-made events.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: Attention to detail is at the heart of every creation

passion.title: Passion
passion.desc: We make every decoration with love

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Always offering modern and impactful concepts

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Custom services for all your events

deco.title: Event Decoration
deco.desc: We design and create custom decorations for all types of events: Wedding (traditional, modern...), Birthday (children & adults), Baby shower & gender reveal, Engagements & marriage proposals, Professional events. From design to installation, every detail is crafted to create an elegant and harmonious atmosphere.

surprise.title: Surprise Organization
surprise.desc: Specialists in special moments, we create unique and emotional surprises: Romantic surprises, Surprise birthdays, Special deliveries (noon, night, midnight...), Personalized staging. We handle everything for a guaranteed wow effect.

themes.title: Custom Theme Design
themes.desc: Every client is unique, every event too. Creation of original concepts, Choice of colors, styles and atmospheres, Adaptation to your budget, Moodboard proposals and creative ideas. Your vision comes to life with a professional touch.

coord.title: Coordination & Organization
coord.desc: We support you in the complete management of your event: Planning, Logistical organization, Day-of coordination, Vendor management. You enjoy fully while we handle everything.

rental.title: Equipment Rental
rental.desc: We provide quality equipment to enhance your events: Tables, chairs, tablecloths, Decorations (arches, flowers, accessories...), Tableware & decorative elements, Event structures (pergolas, backdrops, etc.). A practical solution for professional results.

cta.subtitle: Contact us and let's talk about your event

wedding_common: Included: Hall or green space, DJ/Host/Sound system, Car decoration, Photographer/Videographer, Drinks/Sugared almonds/Caterer, Waitresses/Cakes/Menu card

Logistics: Table/Chair, Cutlery/Sound system, Mini podium, Synthetic turf, Flower pot, Tablecloth
Caterer: 1 Starter, 2 Main courses, 1 Dessert, 4 waitresses
Drinks: Personalized water, Sweets/BB Beers, Wine/Whiskey, Cocktail bar
